groupDefinition.name: Debug Controls
groupDefinition.description: UI components for execution flow control, including step, continue, and pause operations.

items.title: Debug Control Button Functionality
items.description: Connect toolbar control buttons to DAP requests
details: Continue → `continue` request
Step Over → `next` request
Step Into → `stepIn` request
Step Out → `stepOut` request (button was missing from template, added)
Pause → `pause` request
Stop → `disconnect` request
Button state management (Running: only Pause/Stop available; Stopped: Continue/Step available)

items.title: DAP Event Handling & State Management
items.description: Handle DAP Server events and update frontend state
details: `stopped` event → Update to paused state, trigger stackTrace/scopes/variables queries
`continued` event → Update to running state
`terminated` / `exited` events → Update to terminated state, notify user
`output` event → Write to console log
`initialized` event → Trigger `configurationDone`
`breakpoint` event → Update breakpoint display status

items.title: Command Serialization: Control Button In-Flight Guard
items.description: Implement commandInFlight$ BehaviorSubject in DapSessionService and bind button [disabled] in DebuggerComponent per command-serialization.md R-CS1
details: Add private commandInFlightSubject to DapSessionService
Wrap continue/next/stepIn/stepOut/pause with in-flight guard — drop second call while in-flight
Expose public commandInFlight$ Observable
Bind [disabled] to commandInFlight$ on all control buttons in DebuggerComponent template
[Test] guard drops second call; commandInFlight$ emits true/false correctly

items.title: Command Serialization: disconnect/terminate One-Shot Guard
items.description: Add early-exit guard in DapSessionService.disconnect() and terminate() per command-serialization.md R-CS5
details: Add early-return at top of disconnect(): if executionState is terminated/idle/error return Promise.resolve() immediately
Apply same guard to terminate()
[Test] double-call to disconnect() sends only one DAP request; second call returns immediately without error; guard covers all terminal states

items.title: VS Code Compatible Keyboard Shortcuts
items.description: Provide F5/F10/F11/etc. global shortcuts for debug controls.
details: Create KeyboardShortcutService using ngZone.runOutsideAngular for global keydown listener
Implement ActionID enum for debug commands
Map VS Code keys (F5/F10/F11/F9) to ActionIDs
Apply input-guard with Monaco whitelist (ignore if tagName is INPUT/TEXTAREA unless class is 'inputarea')
Integrate with DebuggerComponent handlers using takeUntilDestroyed() cleanup
EditorComponent.toggleBreakpointAtCurrentPosition() for F9
[Test] F5 continues; F10 steps; F9 toggles; Typing 'a' in Monaco doesn't trigger change detection; F10 in Monaco works; F10 in Eval-input is ignored

items.title: Context-Aware Debug Toolbar
items.description: Update debug controls to target the currently active session
details: Refactor DebugControlGroupComponent to use activeSession$
Ensure buttons only affect the selected process
Implement 'Session Target' dropdown/indicator
[Test] Verify stepping commands only affect the selected session
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/WI-97-context-aware-toolbar.md

items.title: Global Debug Lifecycle Actions (Stop All)
items.description: Implement batch operations for managing all active debug sessions
details: Add 'Stop All Sessions' command
Add 'Restart All' capability
Implement confirmation dialogs for batch termination
[Test] Verify all sessions are closed cleanly on 'Stop All'
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/WI-98-global-actions.md

items.title: Fix Execution State Toggle Delay & Stepping Thread Context
items.description: Resolve UI latency where 'stopped' state is delayed after 'next' command. Fix hardcoded threadId in stepping commands.
details: Update DapSessionService to use activeThreadId for next, continue, stepIn, stepOut, and pause. Ensure commandInFlight correctly guards the async period until the response is received.
Add visual indicator for the 'Active' thread in the Thread & Call Stack panel.
[Test] Verify stepping command uses correct active thread ID.
[Test] Verify 'Active' label/icon correctly renders on the selected thread in the UI.
